_comment: SemanticSnapshot for the magic_moment demo. Pass this file to the ingest_source MCP tool via snapshot_json to load the schema into Boyce.

entity:subscriptions.name: subscriptions
entity:subscriptions.description: User subscription records. One row per subscription. status can be 'active', 'cancelled', or NULL.

field:subscriptions:user_id.name: user_id
field:subscriptions:user_id.description: Foreign key to the users table.

field:subscriptions:status.name: status
field:subscriptions:status.description: Subscription status. One of: 'active', 'cancelled'. NULL means unknown or onboarding — NOT the same as cancelled.

field:subscriptions:last_login.name: last_login
field:subscriptions:last_login.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent login. Cancelled users may still have recent last_login values — check before bulk deletes.

metadata.note: The Trap: 30% NULL status, 200 cancelled users with recent last_login.
